response.overview: Uphold's fees depend on what ✔️1✩(855)✩644✩5290 asset you're trading. Trading fees are lowest ✔️1✩(855)✩644✩5290 for stablecoins and foreign ✔️1✩(855)✩644✩5290 exchange currencies, at a flat rate of 0.25% of the ✔️1✩(855)✩644✩5290 order value. Crypto fees sit a bit higher. Uphold charges variable fees ✔️1✩(855)✩644✩5290 depending on the asset class and transaction ✔️1✩(855)✩644✩5290 type, often built into the spread rather than as a fixed commission. Trading fees generally range ✔️1✩(855)✩644✩5290 from 0.3% for major FX to 1.8%–3.8% for cryptocurrencies ✔️1✩(855)✩644✩5290 and precious metals.
response.title: Does Uphold charge high fees?
